product.name: EDM Wire
product.tagline: Precision Wire Solutions for Electrical Discharge Machining
product.overview: EDM Wire, short for Electrical Discharge Machining Wire, is a specially engineered metallic wire used as an electrode in wire-cut EDM machines. This non-contact machining process uses electrical discharges to precisely erode conductive materials—ideal for high-precision, intricate components that are difficult to machine using traditional cutting methods.
product.description: EDM wire serves as the cutting tool in wire EDM (Wire Electrical Discharge Machining) systems. During the machining process, a controlled spark occurs between the wire and the workpiece, removing material without physical contact. The wire itself doesn’t touch the workpiece but erodes it through spark discharge while constantly being fed through the machine.
keyFeatures: High Electrical Conductivity: Enables efficient spark generation and material removal.
Uniform Diameter and Surface Finish: Ensures consistent spark gap and smooth motion through guides.
Mechanical Strength & Tensile Control: Maintains wire stability under tension and high-speed cutting.
Oxidation Resistance: Enhances shelf life and performance, especially in high-humidity environments.
Precision Winding: Reduces tangling and ensures flawless automatic threading.

subProducts.description: Plain Brass EDM Wire is a copper-zinc alloy wire (CuZn37/CuZn40/CuZn35) designed for general-purpose wire-cut EDM applications. It is widely recognized for its stability, affordability, and ease of use, making it the standard choice for non-critical or conventional cutting operations.
advantages: Easy to handle, store, and load
applications: Cutting of low-alloy or mild steel parts

subProducts.description: Diffused Coated EDM Wire is engineered using a multi-layer diffusion process that bonds a zinc-rich alloy into a brass core. This creates a gradient structure that enhances conductivity and thermal transfer, delivering superior cutting speeds and dimensional accuracy.
keyFeatures: Uniform surface hardness for consistent wear
Excellent flushing in deep cuts and narrow kerfs
Ideal for finishing and semi-finishing operations
advantages: Up to 30% faster than plain brass wire
Lower wire consumption with longer spool life
Maintains stability in high-speed, high-tension operations
applications: Multi-cavity tooling and close tolerance jobs

subProducts.description: Zinc Diffused coated EDM Wire is a high-performance product with a thick, homogeneously diffused zinc layer over a brass core. It is designed to perform under the most demanding conditions, delivering unmatched cutting speeds and thermal stability for complex and large workpieces.
material: Zinc diffused coating over brass core
keyFeatures: Precision zinc diffusion layer with uniform structure
High thermal conductivity and superior dielectric efficiency
Consistent arc discharge for critical finishing
Excellent thread ability and wire rigidity
advantages: Speeds up machining by 30–40% over standard brass
Greater efficiency in thick, hardened materials
Uniform wear across long cutting operations
applications: Die casting and forging tool machining
Large steel mold and die segments
Deep cavity and high aspect-ratio cuts

subProducts.description: Zinc Coated EDM Wire features a pure zinc outer layer over a brass core, offering high thermal efficiency and excellent dielectric strength. This wire is optimized for modern EDM systems that support high-speed and automated threading operations.
material: Pure zinc coating over brass core
keyFeatures: Pure zinc coating with low melting point
Compatible with high-frequency pulse EDM units
Ideal for unmanned and long-run cutting cycles
advantages: Increases cutting speed by up to 25%
Better performance in deionized water flushing
Exceptional arc control for micro EDM
applications: Precision components in electronics and semiconductor industries

product.name: Zari Wire
product.tagline: Premium Quality Zari Wire Solutions for Textile, Embroidery & Decorative Craftsmanship
product.overview: At Maheshwari Wires Pvt. Ltd., we offer a refined range of Zari wires—blending heritage craftsmanship with modern metallurgy. Produced using high-quality copper, silver, and metallic coatings, our Zari wires are ideal for intricate hand embroidery, weaving, and embellishments in ethnic and contemporary textiles.
product.description: Whether you are designing bridal wear, sarees, turbans, curtains, or fashion accessories, our Zari wire delivers luster, durability, and fine finish trusted by artisans and export houses alike.
advantages: Fine Finish and Strength for Intricate Work

product.name: Copper Extrusions
product.tagline: Premium Quality Copper Extrusion Solutions for High-Conductivity & Structural Applications
product.overview: At Maheshwari Wires Pvt. Ltd., we manufacture and supply high-performance copper extrusions tailored to meet the needs of power, electrical, mechanical, and architectural industries. Our extruded copper profiles are produced using 99.97% pure electrolytic copper, ensuring superior electrical conductivity, thermal stability, and mechanical strength.
product.description: Available in a wide variety of custom and standard shapes—such as flat bars, round rods, hollow tubes, channels, bus bars, angles, and custom profiles—our copper extrusions deliver precision tolerances, excellent surface finish, and robust performance in demanding environments.
materials_offered: ETP Grade Copper (Electrolytic Tough Pitch – Cu ≥ 99.90%)

architectural_and_decorative: Designer trims, signage frames, stair nosings

packaging_delivery: Wooden crates or pallets for export
Just-in-time (JIT) or bulk supply scheduling available

product.name: Molly Wire
product.tagline: High-Quality Molly Wire for Robust Construction and Fixing Applications
product.overview: Maheshwari Wires Pvt. Ltd. provides durable and precision-engineered Molly wire designed for fixing applications in construction, mechanical assembly, and interior systems. Our wires deliver excellent anchoring performance and strength.
product.description: Molly wire is primarily used in wall anchors, cavity fixings, and structural assemblies. We provide both copper and alloy-based Molly wire in standard and custom dimensions.

product.name: Copper Wire
product.tagline: High-Purity Copper Wires for Electrical, Industrial & Craft Applications
product.overview: Maheshwari Wires Pvt. Ltd. manufactures a wide range of copper wires with high electrical conductivity and mechanical strength. Suitable for power, electronics, automotive, and precision applications.
product.description: Made from ETP and OFC copper, our copper wires are available in bare, tinned, and coated variants. Supplied in different gauges, tempers, and lengths to meet industry standards.
